title: Localize hardcoded EN strings on Org/Skill detail/Costs/Invites pages (ZAI-169)
description:
Parent: [ZAI-169](/SDF/issues/ZAI-169)

Board reports Russian-language UI showing hardcoded English on these pages:

- /SDF/org
- /SDF/skills/{id} (e.g. f26b2bc2-1b5f-46a5-ae18-2dfd8ed4f029)
- /SDF/costs
- /SDF/company/settings/invites

Find all hardcoded English strings on these pages, wire them through `t()`, and add keys to all 8 locales (especially `ru`). Verify by switching UI to Russian and confirming no English leaks remain.

IMPORTANT: Per ZAI-163/ZAI-164, verify cwd is the fork (`paperclip_fork_Enterprise`) before committing — do not leak i18n into upstream public repo.

Acceptance: zero EN leakage on the four listed pages in RU locale; keys present in all 8 locales.
